title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jaypee Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jaypee Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jaypee Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
